summary: Dissatisfied, requesting escalation to another agent
detailed_context: Nick's message 'Dispatch another agent to look at the assistant issue' signals clear dissatisfaction. He's bypassing the current response entirely and asking for escalation rather than requesting corrections. This pattern—especially after an incomplete/cut-off response ('Code (live in th')—indicates the previous answer didn't adequately address the actual problem. The repetition of this request further reinforces the frustration. Nick wants different help.
